scripts.build: npm run build:daemon && APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY="${APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY:-$(bash ../scripts/dev-signing.sh identity)}" tauri build
scripts.build:staging: npm run build:daemon && APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY="${APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY:-$(bash ../scripts/dev-signing.sh identity)}" MERIDIAN_RUNTIME_MANIFEST_URL=https://github.com/Meridiona/meridian/releases/download/runtime-staging/runtime-manifest.json tauri build
